subject: Re: Staff SWE role — next steps
body: Hi Jamie — great chatting last week. Let us know when you've had a chance to review the offer terms. We're excited about the possibility of you joining the platform infra team.

subject: Lunch next week?
body: Hey, are you around next week? Would love to catch up.

subject: Seed round intro — Horizon Capital
body: Jamie, following up on our intro call. Still very interested in learning more about the roadmap. Happy to reconnect when timing works.

subject: Invoice #4482
body: Your invoice is attached. Payment due in 30 days.

subject: Conf talk proposal feedback
body: Hi Jamie — we enjoyed your submission and would like to schedule a follow-up. Let us know your availability over the next two weeks.
